sections.title: If the player loses the race

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You beat me.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Woo hoo! Ha ha! You can try again if you want, but you'll never beat me, I'm far too fast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eat my dust!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're right, I'm far too slow.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: You give up too easily, but have it your way.

sections.title: Talking to him again after losing and prior to starting a new race

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Oh, hello? Looks like you'll probably want to start again.

sections.title: If the player wins the race

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I won!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Noooo! How could you beat me?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just making the most of the abilities I worked hard to develop. That's all!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: True. A very important thing to remember! Now be gone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This looks like an interesting island.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Oh it is.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Fancy a race!?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? That's a bit sudden. What kind of race?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: I bet I can beat you to the other end of this island, I'll take the left route and you can take the right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't seem fair - mine's all curvy and yours is straight.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Well, that's life I'm afraid, it's never as easy as you would like, you have to take the path that's dealt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you insist.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: You'll see, so how about it?

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: On your marks!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Get set!

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Go !!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Ethereal Expert
lines.text: Have it your way.
